name: Adtec Plasma Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Adtec Plasma Technology Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells/supports RF plasma generators, visual matching units, digital RF power tracers, and chamber analyzers in Japan. Its products are installed on tools for LCD panels and semiconductor processes. The company was formerly known as Adtec Co. and changed its name to Adtec Plasma Technology Co., Ltd. in December 2000. Adtec Plasma Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Fukuyama, Japan.
